@52 [C7 | F7]
  A.PIANO 1: E5+G5@1>2^80 D6@3>2^80 C5@4>4^104 E5@6>2^80 G5@7>2^80 C6@8>2^80 B4@10>4^104 C5@11>2^80 E5@12>3^56 B5@14>2^104 A4@15>4^80 C5@17>2^80 E5@18>2^56 A5@19>2^80 G4@21>5^80 A4@22>3^56 C5@24>2^56 G5@25>2^80 F4@27>4^80 G4@29>2^80 C5@30>2^56 F5@31>1^56
@53 [Ddim | C]
  A.PIANO 1: E4@1>4^80 F4@2>2^56 G#4@3>2^56 E5@5>2^56 D4@6>3^56 E4@7>2^56 G#4@9>2^56 D5@10>1^56 D4@12>4^56 E4@13>2^56 G4@15>2^56 D5@16>1^56 C4@17>4^56 E4@19>2^80 G4@20>2^56 C5@21>2^56 D4@23>5^80 E4@25>3^80 G4@26>2^56 D5@27>2^80 C4@29>3^80 E4@30>2^80 G4@31>2^80 C5@32>1^80
@54 [G# | C]

@55 [Am | C] (grid:64)
  A.PIANO 1: C5@1>4^80 B3@4>8^80 C4@7>4^80 E4@8>5^80 B4@11>4^80 A3@15>7^80 C4@17>4^80 E4@19>4^80 A4@22>4^56 G3@25>8^80 A3@28>5^56 C4@31>4^56 G4@33>3^56 F3@37>6^80 G3@39>4^56 C4@41>4^56 F4@44>2^56 E3@48>7^80 F3@50>4^56 G#3@52>5^56 E4@55>4^56 D3@59>5^56 E3@62>2^32 G#3@63>4^56
@56 [Dm] (grid:64)

@57 [Dm7 | C] (grid:64)

@58 [C7] (grid:64)

@60 [C]
